reviews.review_title: About what you'd expect from such an app
reviews.review_description: I watched some videos, then left the theater and went home to my cat.

I like that I can watch trailers in a theater without physically being there in a real one. The size of the screen is okay. Maybe make the screen a little bigger or something? I think the viewing experience can be more comfortable. Also, the chairs need more work. It looks a bit weird and unnatural with the lighting. That being said, not bad for Beta! The user interface is surprisingly very friendly and easy use. I love it. The controlling is as smooth as Apple TV's controls. Anyways, I look forward to seeing more enhancements!

developer_response.body:
Hello. I am sorry that the current screen setup hindered your viewing experience. We are experimenting with different screen sizes to improve comforts. We are also working on making the lighting and the chair more natural, more real. And we are so happy to hear you enjoyed our navigation design! 

We want to thank you for taking the time to write such an encouraging review. Find us on Twitter @vrtubeapp for updates!

reviews.review_description: Got potential but right now it starts you off with a random video. You've got to swipe for other videos and channels. A simple menu screen would be nice.

developer_response.body:
Hello. We are working to bring you the feature to create a personal channel list soon. We are also working on the design of a control panel (menu screen). You are right on with our coming features!

We want to thank you for taking the time to write such an honest review. Find us on Twitter @vrtubeapp for updates!

reviews.review_description: The environments look awesome but it tells me to type in a random code to access a random playlist. I type the code in and hit the red load button and nothing happens? Always a black screen? I have the latest version
Is there a way to search the net, and stream from like say a site cinetv

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for telling us your suggestions and needs. Our team is currently experimenting with a better way to search. All along, VRTube tries to keep providing the easiest way for users to watch videos. In the meantime, you could search videos you want in any browser apps, and copy the video urls to http://vrtube.app to generate a channel list code for being used in VRTube. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us via Twitter @vrtubeapp. Enjoy!

reviews.review_description: it just plays YouTube videos and you have to input the urls for the channel you're looking for. It is functional but not great.

Hey how bout adding more environments and horror channels. maybe you guys should add a home environment you know watch tv in a cool looking house.UPDATE: Is it possible to watch video inside a car in the drive in theater and add a movie theater similar to Bigscreen vr?

developer_response.body: Thanks for the suggestion! The Drive-in space was originally designed to be viewed in the car. However, because Oculus Go does not support 6DoF at present, it will affect the field of vision in the car, so we changed the design to sit in the trunk of the car. When we find the better way to view in the car. We will update the space, and let you know! As for the big theater space, it's just the new space we will launch next time, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Good idea although I wish I could add netflixs

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for enjoying VRTube. Our team is currently experimenting with it. Find us on Twitter @vrtubeapp for updates!

reviews.review_description: I do love the defined gesture to switch channels and videos. It’s simple and retro the way we engage TV in our living room. Well more features are expected but I still hope you will keep such core idea for good.

reviews.review_title: YouTube VR is now in oculus go
reviews.review_description: 1 STAR

developer_response.body: Hi! VRTube will soon support more streaming services, and YouTube is just one of them. Please find us on Twitter @vrtubeapp for updates!

reviews.review_description: Please ditch the playlist youtube channels and allow users to play local files via Samba or stored files in your VR headset.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the suggestion! As for the feature of playing the local files, our team is currently developing it. We hope to provide a more convenient way for users to use this feature. Please stay tuned to our official Twitter account. Any updates will be posted on it.

reviews.review_description: Is this still working, not getting it to work on gear vr

developer_response.body: We're sorry to let you encounter such a problem. The good news is that we have fixed this issue in the latest version (1.7.18). Please update VRTube, and give it a try. Thank you so much!

reviews.review_description: ITS SO ANNOYING !!! to have to go back and forth from my headset to my PC to select stuff, get a code every time i want to watch something,,, plus before doing any of that i have to spend 5 minutes deleting off your playlist first... JUST GIVE US THE NORMAL SEARCH BOX on the app like all apps normally do, instead of this annoying system. 2 stars till you fix this... and five stars after because of the nice theater cinema you added, bought that straight away.

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you for telling us your suggestions and needs. Our team is currently experimenting with a better way to search. All along, VRTube tries to keep providing the easiest way for users to watch videos. In the meantime, please use https://vrtube.app to create your own channel list. Really thanks for your valuable suggestions, and we have also revised the design of the website. You could delete all default channels by one click, and you could edit the same channel list by its unique URL. 
Please try our service again and tell us how you feel. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Google play movies support please 😊

developer_response.body: Hi! our team is currently experimenting with it. Find us on Twitter @vrtubeapp for updates!

reviews.review_description: Worst app ever! Barely works.

developer_response.body: Hi! VRTube is currently working normally. We test every day to ensure that it can operate stably.Is there any operational problem? If you have any problems, please let us know.You can contact us by service@diing.com or @vrtubeapp. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Interesting, good vid quality but no search options? Why bother? You basically scroll swipe to the next video, there’s not even a list to choose from..a developer’s joke?

I like the ambience of this small cinema. The videos look good, and I like being able to choose where to sit. It would be great to play videos from my headset, and search YouTube or watch Netflix. I like the app so far, and I think it will get even better.
Nice App
I thought it would be like YouTube not whatever it is

You are on the way guys. The cinema looks nice. But it would be great if I could choose my video on the playlist I have selected, not only by going back and forth but to have a preview of the Video so I can directly switch to it.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for understanding our efforts, and thank you for telling us your suggestions and needs. Our team are experimenting with the feature you mentioned, so stay tuned. Find us on Twitter @vrtubeapp for updates!
